Completed sessions.

Phase 15 reads completed sessions from state.logs, shows one dot under saved-session dates, supports month navigation, and keeps session details tappable.

History archive built state.logs source Calendar dots built

Saved sessions are read from the same log source that Finish writes to. No fake sessions are generated.

Data + Backup + Media

Media regression locked.

Media Bridge 6 locks the recovered real-media system: real media appears for mapped exercises, Coaching View stays clean fallback only, tap preview works, wrong-media guards remain active, and custom media still overrides exactly.

PendingRegression status

CheckExact + restore

    •

    •

Safe Import Flow
Phase 16D can apply only a validated Full Backup JSON. MERGE preserves current logs and adds missing sessions. REPLACE requires stronger confirmation and creates a safety snapshot first.

Select filePlan

              
RequiredConfirm

              
SnapshotSafety

Danger Zone · Reset test data
Use these only when you are ready to clear test data. Export a backup first if you want to keep anything.

            

              
1
Reset active workout onlyClears the current workout/session and rest timer. Keeps History and custom media.

              
2
Erase workout history / test logsClears completed logs and log-derived calendar/history. Keeps custom media. Reset active workout first if one is running.

              
!
Factory reset this appClears active workout, history, app state, settings, and custom media payloads. Requires typing RESET.

            

            
No reset has run. Nothing clears automatically on boot.

Phase 11E regression checklist
Read-only QA lock for the rest timer. This verifies behavior already built in 11C/11D; it does not add auto-advance or drop-set logic.

            

              
✓
Complete set starts restFresh normal set followed by another normal set starts the dock timer.
audit

              
✓
Edit-save does not restart restDone editing and header edit-save keep rest guarded.
audit

              
✓
End rest worksEnd rest stops active rest and leaves set state intact.
audit

              
✓
Navigation while rest activeToday/History/Data tabs should not clear active rest state.
audit

            

            
Phase 13F regression lock ready. Existing session-only drop-set records still render/complete under parent; full-rest bypass is preserved only before drop sets.

Phase 12C preserved: Complete set should collapse/open next set; final set should move to the next exercise.

          


          

            
Phase 12D auto-advance regression lock
Read-only QA gate for the finished Phase 12 flow. It verifies normal sets, completed-set editing, and rest timer preservation without adding drop sets or smart coach behavior.

            

              
✓
Normal set flowComplete set collapses the finished set and opens the next planned set when available.
audit

              
✓
Final set flowIf no next set remains, the active exercise moves to the next exercise.
audit

              
✓
Editing completed setsDone editing still saves/collapses and does not auto-advance or restart rest.
audit

              
✓
Rest timer preservedNormal rest still starts/stops correctly and edit-save remains guarded.
audit

            

            
Phase 12D preserved under Phase 13D. Drop-set completion and last-main detection are built; rest bypass remains locked.

Phase 13F drop-set regression lock
Read-only QA gate for the completed Phase 13 drop-set flow. It verifies normal rest, drop bypass, edit-save guard, parent rendering, and marks real-phone testing as required.

            

              
✓
Normal → normal restA fresh completed normal set followed by another normal set still starts the normal/full rest timer.
audit

              
✓
Main → drop bypassThe last main set before an existing session-only drop row bypasses full normal rest and prepares the drop set.
audit

              
✓
Edit-save guardEditing a completed set still does not start rest or trigger a drop-set transition cue.
audit

              
✓
Drop row stays under parentExisting session-only drop rows remain rendered as child rows under the correct parent set.
audit

              
✓
Real-phone check requiredAndroid Chrome/manual phone testing is still required before moving beyond the Phase 13 drop-set flow.
phone
